response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical expertise and a diverse background in software development, including full-stack, AI-agent infrastructure, and open-source contributions. While his experience aligns well with the technical requirements, his leadership and strategic AI focus are less explicitly highlighted, warranting further exploration in an interview.
strengths: Extensive 15+ years of experience in software development across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems.
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators.
Entrepreneurial experience with open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective) and startup-like roles within larger organizations.
concerns: Lacks an advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field, which is a preferred qualification.
Limited explicit evidence of high-level strategic leadership or advising customers/partners on AI adoption.
Experience with cloud technologies is present but not deeply emphasized in the resume.
